productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Tops
description: Composition Black top made of 95% viscose and 5% elastane, with short translucent sleeves and twisted ribbon back neck band above a deep round neckline Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your feminity in style with this black top from united colors of benetton. The stylish back and sleeves redefine your feminine side with much elan. Pair this with jeans, heeled sandals and long earrings for a chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in dresses Height-5.8', Chest-33"
